nodes.name: WhatsApp Trigger
nodes.notes:
Node trigger resmi WhatsApp Business Cloud.
Credentials: Settings > Credentials > WhatsApp Business Cloud API
Masukkan: Phone Number ID, Access Token, App Secret, Verify Token

nodes.name: Groq — Classify Intent
nodes.notes:
Credentials: HTTP Header Auth
Name: Authorization
Value: Bearer gsk_xxxxxxxx

nodes.name: Send WA Reply
nodes.notes: Selalu kirim replyText. Build Decision menjamin replyText non-empty.
